title: Regulations
doc_html:
§758.  Regulations

The council may adopt regulations in fulfillment of its responsibilities in accordance with Chapter 13 of Title 49 of the Louisiana Revised Statutes of 1950.  

Added by Acts 1982, No. 528, §1.
